intro: Dev-call intelligence — the running capture of what our daily calls cover (in-product, carriers/vendors, data & servicing), the goals we're driving, the blockers in the way, and items that still need a task. Auto-summarized from the Gemini call recap.
note: Populated by CIH from the Gemini dev-call recap email after each call. (The site is static — the on-page button loads the last CIH-published notes; CIH regenerates this from the newest Gemini email.)
goals: Simplify the enrollment model and move GWT invitations to an agent-driven flow (Jamin mocking up the workflow).
Stand up surrender-workflow logging + automated admin email notifications when a case is marked surrendered.
Fix the ePay data discrepancy — some transactions missing tranche numbers and client names.
Nail down loan-reconciliation logic — paydowns applied directly to balances (no interest), with consistent case-details balance formulas.
Close the trust-date data gaps — run the trust-date script against the tranches DOMO shows as missing.

blockers.ask: Root-cause the data discrepancy from the provided email examples (Mohit).

blockers.ask: Identify which tranches need the trust-date script (compare missing data in DOMO), then run it (group/Mohit).

needs_tasked.t: GWT simplified to agent-driven — build diagrams/mockups + present the workflow
Surrender workflow — admin email notifications on status = surrendered + improved logging
ePay data discrepancy — investigate missing tranche numbers / client names on certain transactions
Agent-account migration — transfer two agents (•••) to a consolidated agent account, no data lost
Annual review report — check yellow highlights + comment on pending orange items

latest_call.title: Dev Meeting
latest_call.lede: Technical demos + operational workflow call. Headlines: the team adopted an agent-driven model to simplify the Great Wealth Transfer process and decided to simplify the enrollment model; a driver's-license documentation bug fix is confirmed ready to deploy; and surrender workflows get improved logging + automated admin email notifications.

items.text: AI tooling for browser automation was demonstrated to the team.
Driver's-license documentation bug fix confirmed READY FOR DEPLOYMENT.
GWT invitation process moving to an agent-driven model — Jamin to build diagrams/mockups and present the updated workflow.
ePay: some transactions are missing tranche numbers and client names — Mohit to root-cause the data discrepancy from the provided examples.
Agent-account migration: transfer two agents (•••) to a consolidated agent account, ensuring no data is lost (Mohit).
Transaction-tracking issues and system downtime were also addressed.
Surrender workflow: improved logging + automated email notifications to admins when a case status flips to surrendered (Olivia to build).
Surrender-status oversight: confirm a flagged surrender case (•••) and verify its status on the surrender sheet (Judy).
Annual review report: check yellow highlights + provide commentary on pending orange items (Shounak).
Surrender workflow → add logging + automated admin email notifications.
